name: Senolytics review-landscape blocked screening

scope.question: Screen recent systematic reviews, meta-analyses, trial-landscape reviews, or evidence maps relevant to senolytics and cellular senescence.

blocking_issues: No authoritative search hits were retrieved because PubMed/NLM DNS resolution was unavailable in the worker environment.
No candidate source row was supplied by context pack or codex job metadata.
summary: No source was screened into the knowledge base in this run. The screening run records the blocked state so the review-landscape gap remains auditable rather than silently unresolved.
next_actions: Repeat screening from a durable PubMed search log once source retrieval is available.
Create eligibility decisions only for concrete source records backed by source snapshots.
